content:
Hi everyone,

Here is our anticipated timeline for the 6.10 release:

  • Start: Sprint 14, 2025-12-31
  • Community PR Last Call: 2026-02-12
  • Core PR Last Call: 2026-02-19
  • Code Freeze: 2026-02-26
  • Curation Team Review: 2026-03-02 through 2026-03-06
  • Release Date: 2026-03-11

Our tracking issue is available here if you want to follow along: https://github.com/IQSS/dataverse-pm/issues/503

Please let us know if you have questions!
We just decided to push all dates out a week.
6.10 release notes are ready for review! Please take a look at https://github.com/IQSS/dataverse/blob/12085-6.10-release-notes/doc/release-notes/6.10-release-notes.md (from PR #12208).

@Dorothea Iglezakis found a bunch of typos: #12222

Merged! Thanks! :heart:
